text:
council, group of people who come together to consult, deliberate, or make decisions, also known as kurul. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "group of humans",
 "organization",
 "governing body",
 "executive board"
- Commons category: "Councils"
- said to be the same as: "rada"
- has characteristic: "authority"
- instance of: "group of humans"
